productDisplayName: Catwalk Women Ballerina Turquoise Casual Shoe
description: Revel in the comfort of synthetic leather and look stylish in ease in this pair of mocassins from catwalk. Pair it with ethno-western clothes for a fab-yet-comfy look. Upper Synthetic leather upper with a heel cup and fabric bow on the toe box region for absolute durability, comfort and style Slip-on style for ease of wear Canvas footbed for all-day comfort Brand name embroidered on the lateral side Outsole TPU outsole stitched to the footbed for absolute durability Sandal care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
